Site.title: Machine Learning Engineer
Site.bio: Machine Learning Engineer at the Non-Bank Financial Authority of Cambodia, building Khmer ASR systems from the ground up — audio data pipelines, Whisper fine-tuning, and a full-stack deployment portal (FastAPI + Vue). CADT graduate 2026 with a thesis on Khmer speech recognition. Currently preparing for my next chapter at a Japanese tech company.

Hero.subtitle: I build speech recognition systems for Khmer — from audio data pipelines and Whisper fine-tuning to full-stack ASR portals. Low-resource languages deserve great speech AI.

AboutSection.title: About
AboutSection.heading: Building speech AI for underrepresented languages
AboutSection.bio2: When I'm not training ASR models or wrangling audio datasets, I write about speech technology and low-resource NLP on this blog.

ContactSection.description: Open to collaborations on speech AI, low-resource language technology, or interesting ML problems. Whether you're working on ASR, NLP, or something adjacent — feel free to reach out.

AboutPage.label: About
AboutPage.focusParagraph: My focus is speech AI for low-resource languages — specifically Khmer. I work across the full pipeline: data collection and annotation, TTS-based augmentation, model fine-tuning, and building the infrastructure to deploy and evaluate models in production. I believe great speech technology should exist for every language, not just the well-resourced ones.
AboutPage.prepParagraph: Currently preparing for my next chapter at make.co.ltd, a Japanese IT company in Osaka, where I'll be studying Japanese IT practices. Outside of work I write about speech technology and low-resource NLP on this blog.

ContactPage.description: Get in touch — open to full-time roles, consulting, and interesting projects.
